notes: v0.2.17: Clip Branding. Exported clips now carry a 'Made with JamSync' audio tag (1.12s ElevenLabs voice tag, Juniper voice) mixed into the start and end. Clips ≥5s get bookended, 2-5s get end-only, under 2s skip the tag. Tag is mixed at ~40% volume on top of the underlying audio — trimming the clip edges doesn't remove it without actual phase-cancel editing.
